# llms.txt - Abdul-Rashid Lansah | uxlansah.com

## Who I am

Abdul-Rashid Lansah is a Senior Product Designer based in Ghana, specializing in AI-native product design and 0-to-1 builds. 7+ years of experience across Fintech, Edtech, and B2B SaaS. Available for remote work globally.

## Skills & Tools

- Product Design (0-to-1, AI-native, systems thinking)
- Tools: Figma, Claude Code, Cursor, Framer Motion
- Domains: Fintech, Edtech, B2B SaaS, AI products
- Design Systems, UX Research, Interaction Design

## Case Studies

- [Jenesys](https://www.uxlansah.com/jenesys-case-study) - AI-native platform design
- [PayChalk](https://www.uxlansah.com/paychalk-case-study) - Fintech product design
- [Tikiti](https://www.uxlansah.com/tikiti-case-study) - Event platform design
- [Tikiti Dashboard](https://www.uxlansah.com/tikiti-dashboard-case-study) - Analytics dashboard
- [TumaPay](https://www.uxlansah.com/tumapay-case-study) - Payment product design
- [BorLaPay](https://www.uxlansah.com/borlapay-case-study) - Fintech design
- [Receipt2Recipe](https://www.uxlansah.com/receipt2recipe-case-study) - AI product design
- [ReliefLedger](https://www.uxlansah.com/reliefledger-case-study) - Humanitarian fintech
- [Parley](https://www.uxlansah.com/parley-case-study) - Communication platform
- [MrVisa](https://www.uxlansah.com/mrvisa-case-study) - Immigration product
- [Kaaka](https://www.uxlansah.com/kaaka-case-study) - Consumer product
- [SheFundit](https://www.uxlansah.com/shefundit-case-study) - Funding platform
